metadata.name: SANDRA Resource Graph Use Case V1

rules: the Resource Graph is composed of existing canonical ManagedObject and Relationship resources
the Application Layer does not redefine canonical graph resources
graph retrieval is bounded by root direction relationship types and maximum depth
the root resource must be present in every returned snapshot
impact references must identify resources returned in the same snapshot
graph retrieval does not mutate authoritative state
graph retrieval does not evaluate policy
graph retrieval does not create execution plans
technology-specific topology calls belong to outbound adapters
the Habitat is not treated as one atomic aggregate
